title: 2026 Golden Globes Predictions from an Entertainment Editor
text: 2026 Golden Globes Predictions Summary. Film Categories: Best Drama: Sinners (featuring Michael B. Jordan). Best Actor, Drama: Michael B. Jordan for Sinners. Best Actress, Drama: Jessie Buckley for Hamnet. Best Comedy/Musical: One Battle After Another. Best Actor, Comedy/Musical: Timothée Chalamet for Marty Supreme. Best Actress, Comedy/Musical: Amanda Seyfried for The Testament of Ann Lee. Television Categories: Best Limited Series: Adolescence. Best Drama Series: The Pitt. Best Actor, Drama Series: Noah Wyle for The Pitt. Best Actress, Drama Series: Rhea Seehorn for Pluribus. Best Comedy/Musical Series: The Studio. Best Actor, Comedy/Musical Series: Seth Rogen for The Studio. Best Actress, Comedy/Musical Series: Jean Smart for Hacks. The predictions come from Philip Mutz, VP of News and Entertainment at PureWow. The ceremony airs January 11, 2026, hosted by Nikki Glaser on CBS and Paramount+.
